items.summary: Redesign the HeroSection component with the following exact content and styles: heading 'Grow Your Business Online' (large, bold, white #FFFFFF), subheading 'Digital Marketing Agency in Thoothukudi' (medium weight, gold #F4B400), tagline 'Turning Clicks Into Clients' (italic or lighter weight, white #FFFFFF). Remove the previous long headline. Section background must be solid dark navy #0B1C2D with a subtle dark gradient overlay. CTA buttons: primary 'Get Free Consultation' with background #F4B400 and text color #0B1C2D; secondary 'Contact Us' outlined with gold border #F4B400 and white text. Remove the stats row or keep it minimal. The section must remain full-screen (min 100vh) and fully responsive.

Redesign the WhyChooseUsSection component with the following specifications: Section heading reads 'Why Choose AKS Digital Media Solutions?' in white (#FFFFFF). Section background uses a black gradient (e.g., linear-gradient from #000000 to #0B1C2D or similar dark black gradient). Display exactly 4 benefit boxes in a 2-column (desktop) / 1-column (mobile) grid with the following labels: (1) Result-Oriented Strategies, (2) Affordable Packages, (3) Local Market Expertise (Thoothukudi Focus), (4) Personalized Support. Each box should show a gold checkmark icon (✔), a bold white title, and a short supporting description. Box styling: dark semi-transparent background card, gold (#F4B400) accent on icon/border highlight, rounded corners, subtle box shadow. Remove the existing bottom CTA strip or restyle it to match the new dark theme.

Generate a new hero background image for the AKS Digital Media Solutions website that matches the dark navy and gold brand identity visible on the uploaded business card. The image should depict a dark starfield/cosmic digital atmosphere with deep navy blue (#0B1C2D) background, gold particle bokeh effects, and subtle digital marketing visual elements. This image should be used as the hero section background.
